title: ArchiveWeb.page
description: Record a high-fidelity WACZ web archive of the page using the Webrecorder ArchiveWeb.page Chrome extension.

CHROME_BINARY.description: Path to a Chromium-family browser binary

ARCHIVEWEBPAGE_ENABLED.description: Enable ArchiveWeb.page WACZ recording during archiving

ARCHIVEWEBPAGE_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum seconds to wait for the WACZ download after stopping recording

ARCHIVEWEBPAGE_HOOK_BUDGET_MS.description: Soft per-hook latency budget in ms (start/stop hooks try to finish within this; not a hard cutoff for large captures)

ARCHIVEWEBPAGE_AUTORUN_BEHAVIORS.description: Run AWP behaviors (autopilot) during recording. Off by default since infiniscroll/other plugins drive page actions.

ARCHIVEWEBPAGE_COLLECTION_TITLE.description: Collection title to use when AWP has no default collection yet

CHROME_DOWNLOADS_DIR.description: Chrome downloads directory (defaults to persona-scoped chrome_downloads dir)
